span.p:
re-output BYTE-IDENTICAL
at zero model tokens

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
demand-page top-k working set;
quarantined pages are NEVER candidates

color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
clearance is NECESSARY but NOT SUFFICIENT.
The re-screen is the precise lever a TIGHTENED pattern set pulls:
a page that looked benign at write time is RE-CAUGHT on page-in.
5/5 adversarial skeptics (default-REFUTED) CONFIRMED the moat.
